content.text:
<user_query>
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Question Bank API
  description: |
    Comprehensive API for managing and retrieving question papers.
    Includes Authentication, Public Retrieval, and Admin Management with RBAC.
  version: 1.0.0

servers:
  - url: http://localhost:8080/api/v1
    description: Local development server

tags:
  - name: Auth
    description: User registration and authentication
  - name: QuestionPapers
    description: Public endpoints for retrieving question papers
  - name: Admin
    description: |
      Protected endpoints for management. 
      Requires `Bearer` token with `admin` or `instructor` role.

components:
  securitySchemes:
    bearerAuth:
      type: http
      scheme: bearer
      bearerFormat: JWT

  schemas:
    Role:
      type: string
      enum:
        - admin
        - instructor
        - student
      description: User roles for RBAC

    Session:
      type: string
      enum:
        - AN
        - FN
      description: Examination session (Afternoon / Forenoon)

    FileType:
      type: string
      enum:
        - pdf
        - word
        - excel
        - google_sheet
      description: Format of the question paper file

    QuestionPaper:
      type: object
      properties:
        question_paper_id:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          example: 1
        subject_name:
          type: string
          example: "Advanced Mathematics"
        subject_code:
          type: string
          example: "MATH-401"
        department_name:
          type: string
          example: "Computer Science"
        department_code:
          type: string
          example: "CS"
        session:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Session"
        batch:
          type: string
          example: "2023"
        question_paper_url:
          type: string
          description: Internal storage URL or Google Sheet URL
          example: "http://localhost:8080/api/v1/question-papers/1/download"
        question_paper_type:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileType"
        question_paper_creation_date:
          type: string
          format: date
          example: "2023-05-15"
        created_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        updated_at:
          type: string
          format: date-time
        created_by:
          type: string
          example: "admin@example.com"
        updated_by:
          type: string
          example: "instructor@example.com"

    SignupRequest:
      type: object
      required: [email, password, name, tenant_id, role]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          example: "user@example.com"
        password:
          type: string
          format: password
          example: "securepassword123"
        name:
          type: string
          example: "John Doe"
        tenant_id:
          type: integer
          format: int64
          example: 1
        role:
          $ref: "#/components/schemas/Role"

    LoginRequest:
      type: object
      required: [email, password]
      properties:
        email:
          type: string
          format: email
          example: "user@example.com"
        password:
          type: string
          format: password
          example: "securepassword123"

    LoginResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        accessToken:
          type: string
          description: JWT token for authentication
        refreshToken:
          type: string

    SignupResponse:
      type: object
      properties:
        message:
          type: string
          example: "User created"

    ErrorResponse:
      type: object
      required: [code, message, details, traceID]
      properties:
        code:
          type: integer
          description: |
            Application-level error codes:
            - 1000: Generic Error
            - 1001: Not Found
            - 1002: Parameter Absent
            - 1003: Parameter Invalid
            - 1004: Access Denied
            - 1005: Request Invalid
            - 1006: Not Implemented
            - 1007: Conflict (e.g. User already exists)
            - 1008: Unauthorized
          example: 1003
        message:
          type: string
          example: "Invalid ID"
        details:
          type: string
          example: "strconv.ParseInt: parsing 'abc': invalid syntax"
        traceID:
          type: string
          example: "2e75458d931ab178664f981feee8d34c"

  responses:
    Unauthorized:
      description: Authentication required or token invalid
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            code: 1008
            message: "Unauthorized"
            details: "missing or invalid token"
            traceID: "..."
    Forbidden:
      description: Insufficient permissions (RBAC)
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            code: 1004
            message: "Access Denied"
            details: "role student is not allowed"
            traceID: "..."
    NotFound:
      description: Resource not found
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            code: 1001
            message: "Not Found"
            details: "question paper with ID 999 not found"
            traceID: "..."
    BadRequest:
      description: Invalid parameters or request body
      content:
        application/json:
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
          example:
            code: 1003
            message: "Parameter Invalid"
            details: "Invalid ID format"
            traceID: "..."

paths:
  /auth/signup:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Register a new user
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupRequest"
      responses:
        "201":
          description: User created
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/SignupResponse"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "409":
          description: User already exists
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/ErrorResponse"
              example:
                code: 1007
                message: "Conflict"
                details: "user with this email already exists"
                traceID: "..."

  /auth/login:
    post:
      tags: [Auth]
      summary: Authenticate user and get tokens
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          application/json:
            schema:
              $ref: "#/components/schemas/LoginRequest"
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Login successful
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/LoginResponse"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"

  /question-papers:
    get:
      tags: [QuestionPapers]
      summary: List question papers with filters
      parameters:
        - name: subject_code
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: department_code
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: batch
          in: query
          schema:
            type: string
        - name: session
          in: query
          schema:
            $ref: "#/components/schemas/Session"
        - name: date
          in: query
          description: Format YYYY-MM-DD
          schema:
            type: string
            format: date
      responses:
        "200":
          description: List of question papers
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                type: array
                items:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/QuestionPaper"

  /question-papers/{question_paper_id}:
    get:
      tags: [QuestionPapers]
      summary: Get question paper details
      parameters:
        - name: question_paper_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Success
          content:
            application/json:
              schema:
                $ref: "#/components/schemas/QuestionPaper"
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /question-papers/{question_paper_id}/download:
    get:
      tags: [QuestionPapers]
      summary: Download the question paper file
      description: |
        Returns the file directly if it's stored on the server. 
        If it's a `google_sheet` type, it might return a redirect (301) depending on implementation, 
        but usually it provides the link in the `QuestionPaper` object. 
        In this implementation, it attempts to serve the file.
      parameters:
        - name: question_paper_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      responses:
        "200":
          description: File content
          content:
            application/octet-stream:
              schema:
                type: string
                format: binary
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

  /admin/question-papers:
    post:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Create a new question paper
      description: |
        Requires `Bearer` token (Admin/Instructor).
        Uses `multipart/form-data`.
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              required:
                - subject_name
                - subject_code
                - department_name
                - department_code
                - session
                - batch
                - question_paper_type
                - question_paper_creation_date
              properties:
                subject_name:
                  type: string
                subject_code:
                  type: string
                department_name:
                  type: string
                department_code:
                  type: string
                session:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Session"
                batch:
                  type: string
                question_paper_type:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileType"
                question_paper_creation_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date
                created_by:
                  type: string
                  description: Email of the creator
                question_paper_google_sheet_url:
                  type: string
                  description: Required if type is `google_sheet`
                question_paper_file:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
                  description: Required if type is NOT `google_sheet`
      responses:
        "201":
          description: Created successfully
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"

  /admin/question-papers/{question_paper_id}:
    put:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Update an existing question paper
      description: |
        Requires `Bearer` token (Admin/Instructor).
        Uses `multipart/form-data`.
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: question_paper_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      requestBody:
        required: true
        content:
          multipart/form-data:
            schema:
              type: object
              properties:
                subject_name:
                  type: string
                subject_code:
                  type: string
                department_name:
                  type: string
                department_code:
                  type: string
                session:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/Session"
                batch:
                  type: string
                question_paper_type:
                  $ref: "#/components/schemas/FileType"
                question_paper_creation_date:
                  type: string
                  format: date
                updated_by:
                  type: string
                question_paper_google_sheet_url:
                  type: string
                question_paper_file:
                  type: string
                  format: binary
      responses:
        "200":
          description: Updated successfully
        "400":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/BadRequest"
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

    delete:
      tags: [Admin]
      summary: Delete a question paper
      description: Requires `Bearer` token (Admin/Instructor).
      security:
        - bearerAuth: []
      parameters:
        - name: question_paper_id
          in: path
          required: true
          schema:
            type: integer
            format: int64
      responses:
        "204":
          description: Deleted successfully
        "401":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Unauthorized"
        "403":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/Forbidden"
        "404":
          $ref: "#/components/responses/NotFound"

This is the open-spec for my question paper management system write a backend for this "monolithic architecture format" -> "client req->server->DB" format 

backend - Node.js
Database - Postgres SQL
</user_query>
Exploring the workspace and implementing a monolithic Node.js + PostgreSQL backend that matches your OpenAPI spec.
Workspace is empty. Creating a monolithic Express + PostgreSQL backend that implements the OpenAPI spec.
Fixing the schema: removing `CITEXT` (requires extra extension), fixing the tenant seed, and relaxing the CHECK so updates remain valid.
Fixing JWT signing so claims are consistent, and verifying `res.sendFile` usage.

Here’s what was added: a **single-process Express app** (client → HTTP → route handlers → services → `pg` → PostgreSQL), aligned with your OpenAPI behavior.

### Layout
- **`src/server.js`** – listens on `PORT` (default **8080**), ensures `uploads/`.
- **`src/app.js`** – mounts `/api/v1`, global 404 + error handler.
- **`src/routes/`** – `auth`, public `question-papers`, admin `question-papers`.
- **`src/services/`** – auth + question-paper logic and SQL.
- **`src/middleware/`** – JWT + RBAC (`admin` / `instructor` only on admin routes), `multer` uploads, centralized errors.
- **`db/schema.sql`** – `tenants`, `users`, `question_papers` + enums for session / file type / role.
- **`scripts/migrate.js`** – runs `schema.sql` against `DATABASE_URL`.

### Behavior (spec-mapped)
- **Auth:** `POST /api/v1/auth/signup` (needs existing `tenant_id`; migration seeds **tenant `1`**) and `POST /api/v1/auth/login` → `{ accessToken, refreshToken }` (JWT; refresh is separate secret, no refresh route in spec).
- **Public:** list with query filters, get by id, download (file → `sendFile` with `application/octet-stream`–style headers; `google_sheet` → **302** to stored URL).
- **Admin:** `POST`/`PUT` **multipart/form-data** with `question_paper_file` **or** `question_paper_google_sheet_url` when type is `google_sheet`; **`DELETE`** removes DB row and deletes stored file.
- **Errors:** JSON `{ code, message, details, traceID }` with codes **1000–1008** and HTTP status mapping as in your spec.

### Run it
1. Create a Postgres database and set **`DATABASE_URL`** (see `.env.example`).
2. Copy `.env.example` → `.env` and set **`JWT_ACCESS_SECRET`** / **`JWT_REFRESH_SECRET`** (long random strings).
3. `npm run db:migrate`
4. `npm run dev` or `npm start`

**First user:** sign up with `"tenant_id": 1` (from the seed), and use `"role": "admin"` or `"instructor"` if you need admin APIs. Send admin requests with `Authorization: Bearer <accessToken>`.
